Overview

Address
506 WEST 5TH STREET, LAPLACE, LA 70068

9856529538

79 (53% of beds filled)

Setting
Urban
1 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 1/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 2/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
★★★★★ 2/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 1/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 1/5

Staffing & Workforce

Direct-care staffing is the strongest operational driver of quality in nursing homes. Values are hours per resident per day, derived from payroll-based journal (PBJ) submissions. "Case-mix" adjusts for resident acuity; "Adjusted" is the CMS rating-input value.

Role Reported Case-mix expected Adjusted Federal floor
Total nurse
All nursing staff combined: RN + LPN + Aide
 3.37 3.74 3.48 ≥ 3.48 Below floor
Registered Nurse (RN)
Licensed RN hours. Strongest driver of clinical outcomes.
 0.35 0.65 0.37 ≥ 0.55 Below floor
Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN)
LPN/LVN hours. Often handles medication administration.
 1.34 0.83 1.38 —
Nurse aide
CNA hours. Bulk of direct resident care — bathing, feeding, mobility.
 1.68 2.25 1.73 —
Licensed (RN + LPN)
Combined licensed nurse coverage.
 1.69 — — —
Physical therapist
Rehabilitation therapist hours — important for post-acute / rehab admissions.
 0.06 — — —

Federal minimums (phasing in under the CMS 2024 minimum staffing rule) shown for reference. RN: 0.55 hrs/resident/day. Total nurse: 3.48 hrs/resident/day.

Weekend staffing

Total nurse (weekend)
3.06
hrs / resident / day
RN (weekend)
0.25
hrs / resident / day
Total nurse (adjusted, weekend)
3.16
hrs / resident / day

Weekend under-staffing is a common quality-of-care concern — adverse events are more frequent when licensed coverage drops.

Staff turnover

Total nursing staff turnover
50.0%
annual
RN turnover
50.0%
annual
Administrators departed
0
last 12 months

Resident acuity

Nursing Case-Mix Index
1.32
higher acuity than avg
Case-Mix Index Ratio
0.96
facility / state ratio

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2025-08-13 11 5 10 52 1 52
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2024-08-07 21 7 14 124 2 186
Total weighted health score
85.5
lower is better

Deficiencies (44)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

44 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2026-01-15 2026-02-10
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. D 2025-08-13 2025-09-18
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. D 2025-08-13 2025-09-18
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. D 2025-08-13 2025-09-18
0803 Ensure menus must meet the nutritional needs of residents, be prepared in advance, be followed, be updated, be reviewed by dietician, and meet the needs of the resident. D 2025-08-13 2025-09-18
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. D 2025-08-13 2025-09-18
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. D 2025-04-30 2025-07-21
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2025-04-30 2025-05-30
0628 Provide the required documentation or notification related to the resident's needs, appeal rights, or bed-hold policies. E 2025-04-30 2025-05-30
0644 Coordinate assessments with the pre-admission screening and resident review program; and referring for services as needed. D 2025-04-30 2025-06-14
0838 Conduct and document a facility-wide assessment to determine what resources are necessary to care for residents competently during both day-to-day operations (including nights and weekends) and emergencies. E 2025-04-30 2025-05-30
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. D 2024-09-05 2024-10-04
0583 Keep residents' personal and medical records private and confidential. D 2024-08-07 2024-09-24
0645 PASARR screening for Mental disorders or Intellectual Disabilities D 2024-08-07 2024-09-24
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. E 2024-08-07 2024-09-24
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. E 2024-08-07 2024-09-24
0755 Provide pharmaceutical services to meet the needs of each resident and employ or obtain the services of a licensed pharmacist. E 2024-08-07 2024-10-08
0791 Provide or obtain dental services for each resident. D 2024-08-07 2024-09-24
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. D 2024-08-07 2024-09-24
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. E 2024-06-27 2024-08-07
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. E 2024-06-27 2024-08-07
0940 Develop, implement, and/or maintain an effective training program for all new and existing staff members. D 2024-06-27 2024-08-07
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. E 2024-05-02 2024-06-16
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. E 2024-05-02 2024-06-16
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. E 2024-05-02 2024-06-16
0580 Immediately tell the resident, the resident's doctor, and a family member of situations (injury/decline/room, etc.) that affect the resident. E 2024-01-04 2024-02-01
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2024-01-04 2024-02-01
0842 Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. D 2024-01-04 2024-02-01
0558 Reasonably accommodate the needs and preferences of each resident. D 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0567 Honor the resident's right to manage his or her financial affairs. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. D 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. D 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0678 Provide basic life support, including CPR, prior to the arrival of emergency medical personnel , subject to physician orders and the resident’s advance directives. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0689 Ensure that a nursing home area is free from accident hazards and provides adequate supervision to prevent accidents. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0698 Provide safe, appropriate dialysis care/services for a resident who requires such services. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0755 Provide pharmaceutical services to meet the needs of each resident and employ or obtain the services of a licensed pharmacist. D 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0757 Ensure each resident’s drug regimen must be free from unnecessary drugs. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2023-11-02 2024-01-31
0755 Provide pharmaceutical services to meet the needs of each resident and employ or obtain the services of a licensed pharmacist. E 2023-08-24 2023-10-08
0761 Ensure drugs and biologicals used in the facility are labeled in accordance with currently accepted professional principles; and all drugs and biologicals must be stored in locked compartments, separately locked, compartments for controlled drugs. D 2023-08-24 2023-10-08
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2023-05-18 2023-07-02
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. D 2023-05-18 2023-07-02

Deficiencies 0791 — survey_date 2024-08-07 0791.survey_date
Deficiencies 0791 — tag 0791 0791.tag
Deficiencies 0803 — correction_date 2025-09-18 0803.correction_date
Deficiencies 0803 — description Ensure menus must meet the nutritional needs of residents, be prepared in advance, be followed, be updated, be reviewed by dietician, and meet the needs of the resident. 0803.description
Deficiencies 0803 — scope_severity D 0803.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0803 — survey_date 2025-08-13 0803.survey_date
Deficiencies 0803 — tag 0803 0803.tag
Deficiencies 0812 — correction_date 2025-09-18 0812.correction_date
Deficiencies 0812 — description Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. 0812.description
Deficiencies 0812 — scope_severity D 0812.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0812 — survey_date 2025-08-13 0812.survey_date
Deficiencies 0812 — tag 0812 0812.tag
Deficiencies 0838 — correction_date 2025-05-30 0838.correction_date
Deficiencies 0838 — description Conduct and document a facility-wide assessment to determine what resources are necessary to care for residents competently during both day-to-day operations (including nights and weekends) and emergencies. 0838.description
Deficiencies 0838 — scope_severity E 0838.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0838 — survey_date 2025-04-30 0838.survey_date
Deficiencies 0838 — tag 0838 0838.tag

Deficiencies 0842 — description Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. 0842.description
